subTitle: Miranda believes she has been stood up until she learns her date died of a heart attack. Later, she agrees to go to the wake and meets a man who used to date Carrie.

subTitle: Distressed by a hateful glance from Natasha, who observes the quartet in a restaurant, Carrie becomes disoriented and falls victim to theft.

subTitle: Carrie and Samantha address issues with disruptive neighbours. Meanwhile, Miranda fears that the takeaway attendant laughs at her for placing single-person orders.

subTitle: As a video from the night of the crime surfaces, Mare questions suspects in the case and gives an icy welcome to county detective Colin Zabel who is called in to assist.

title: Mare of Easttown
subTitle: While Mare and Colin analyse new evidence, a recorded call leads to an unlikely suspect. Meanwhile, after Mare attacks Helen because of a possible custody battle, she receives advice from Richard.

title: Mare of Easttown
subTitle: With Mare forced to take a backseat on the case, Colin presses a local priest about the vague circumstances that prompted his transfer to the parish.

title: Mare of Easttown
subTitle: Mare opens up about her family history during therapy sessions. Meanwhile, Lori tries to get to the bottom of her son's outburst at school.

title: Mare of Easttown
subTitle: Mare returns to work and immediately takes care of the murdered girl. Meanwhile, during investigations, the victim's bike is found in the river and the policewoman has to face the demons of her past.

title: Mare of Easttown
subTitle: When her investigation takes a series of devastating turns, Mare's friends and family members process the fallout as she attempts to finally find her own way forward.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: Faded television starlet Valerie Cherish attempts to land a role in a new sitcom, Room and Bored, by taking part in a reality show chronicling her somewhat mortifying comeback.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: The cast flies to New York City to introduce the media to Aunt Sassy and her attractive charges. As that happens, the ever bubbly Valerie gets a reality check on just how far her star has fallen.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: After a table read for the first official episode, Valerie invites her young costars to a bonding meal, but Juna doesn't show up. However, the two make up later with personal lunch.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: Valerie fights to change a potentially offensive line written for Aunt Sassy.
